title: indexed list
text: indexed list A list in which each item is identified by an integer representing the absolute position of the item in the list. Related Links list A string comprising one or more items, in which items are separated by a subfield separator character. A list can contain the possible values for a field (known as a ValRep list). How a list is presented to users depends on the type of widget, and the properties for the field in which the list is displayed. associative list A list in which each list item consists of a pair of associated values representing a key and value, or a value and its representation. In Uniface, list items are separated by a Gold separator, such as Gold-semicolon (;). For example, "CA=Canada;DE=Germany;US=United States". Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
